content.text: 🔥 We are going to release a new research paper of NL2SQL evaluation:
content.title: Are Diffusion Language Models Good Database Analysts?

content.text: 🔥 It is glad to notice that our research paper:
content.title: Representation Calibration and Uncertainty Guidance for Class-Incremental Learning based on Vision Language Model
content.venue: has been accepted by poster of the main conference of 2026 IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME 2026)! This year, ICME received 3,810 valid submissions and accepted 1,101 papers, for an acceptance rate of 28.89%.

content.text: 📖 Join Paradoox AI as a researcher. I will be responsible for the research and development of the AI for the financial industry.
🔥 It is glad to notice that our research paper:
content.title: Effective Learning for Small Reasoning Models: An Empirical Study on 0.5B Reasoning LLMs
content.venue: has been accepted by poster of the main conference of 2026 Conference on Principles and Practice of Language Modeling (CPAL 2026)!

content.text: 🔥 It is glad to notice that our research paper:
content.title: Augmenting Continual Learning of Diseases with LLM-Generated Visual Concepts
content.venue: has been accepted by poster and oral presentation of the main conference of 2025 IEEE International Conference on Bioinformatics and Biomedicine (BIBM 2025)!

content.text: 🔥 It is glad to notice that our long research paper:
content.title: SQL-R1: Training Natural Language to SQL Reasoning Model By Reinforcement Learning
content.venue: has been accepted by poster of the main conference of The 39th Annual Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2025)! We have fully released the weights of SQL-R1 series models and related training codes on GitHub and HuggingFace. There were 21575 valid paper submissions to the NeurIPS Main Track this year, of which the program committee accepted 5290 (24.52%) papers in total. See you in San Diego!

content.text: 🔥 It is glad to notice that survey paper of HKUST(GZ)-DIAL Lab, NL2SQL Research Group:
content.title: A Survey of NL2SQL with Large Language Models: Where are we, and where are we going
content.venue: has been accepted by IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering Journal (TKDE 2025)! We have released the NL2SQL Handbook in August 2024.

content.text: 🎉 Successfully completed my research internship at IDEA Research. I would like to express my sincere gratitude to all the mentors and colleagues for their guidance and support.
🔥 We release a technical study about 0.5B reasoning language models:
content.title: Effective Learning for Small Reasoning Models: An Empirical Study on 0.5B Reasoning LLMs.
content.venue: PDF version is available on arXiv.

content.text: 🎉 Successfully pass the M.Phil. Thesis Defense in HKUST(GZ), thanks my supervisors Prof. Yuyu Luo and Prof. Nan Tang!
🔥 We release a brand new research about RL-based NL2SQL model:
content.title: SQL-R1: Training Natural Language to SQL Reasoning Model By Reinforcement Learning.
content.venue: The relevant code and weights are updated simultaneously on Github and Huggingface.

content.text: 📖 Receive internship offer and start a new journey at International Digital Economy Academy (IDEA), Shenzhen.
🎉 Successfully pass the Mid-Term Group Project Defense of the M.Phil. degree. Thanks AASG Group!
🔥 First long research paper of my RPG life:
content.title: A Plug-and-Play Natural Language Rewriter for Natural Language to SQL
content.venue: is released and available on arXiv.

content.text: 🎉 Successfully pass the Postgraduate Qualifying Assessment (PQA) of M.Phil. degree.
Start my M.Phil. journey at HKUST(GZ).
📖 Receive Research Postgraduate Program (RPG) offers of 2023-2024 Fall from HKUST(GZ) and CUHK(SZ).
🔥 Long research paper of my undergraduate life:
content.title: Development and Validation of a Deep-broad Ensemble Model for Early Detection of Alzheimer's Disease
content.venue: has been accepted by Frontiers in Neuroscience (JCR Q2 Journal, IF: 5.8).

content.text: 🎉 Successfully pass the Undergraduate Thesis Defense in Jinan University.
